conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email.
org_constraint: The tone of the email should be formal and professional.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "Hey there, hope you're doing awesome!"
instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email. The tone of the email should be formal and professional. The email must include the phrase "Hey there, hope you're doing awesome!"
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Molecular Biology Research Opportunities

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is [Your Full Name], and I am currently an undergraduate student majoring in [Your Major] at [Your University]. I have been following your work in [mention a specific area of the professor's research, e.g., gene expression or protein folding] with great interest, particularly your recent publication on [mention a specific paper or topic if possible].

Hey there, hope you're doing awesome!

I am writing to respectfully inquire if you might be accepting new undergraduate research assistants for the upcoming semester. I have a strong foundation in molecular biology techniques and am eager to contribute to your lab's ongoing projects. My academic background includes [briefly mention relevant coursework, lab experience, or skills], and I am highly motivated to gain hands-on experience in a professional research environment.

If you are open to discussing potential opportunities, I would be grateful for the chance to meet briefly at your convenience or to provide my CV and transcript for your review.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Student ID Number]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your LinkedIn Profile or Personal Website URL (optional)]
